name: Basil Pesto Sauce Over Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water according to package instructions until firm to the bite. Drain and place in serving bowl.
2. In food processor, puree basil, chicken stock or water, pine nuts, parmesan cheese, olive oil, and crushed garlic until smooth. Pour over pasta and toss.
Tips: Refrigerate sauce up to 5 days ahead, or freeze up to 6 weeks.
